name: spark_v0_1
purpose: Minimal perturbation event serving as input to the kernel map r0 -> r1.

face.description: Boundary face on which the perturbation occurs.

sector.description: Local sector of the face in which the perturbation is localized.

polarity.description: Discrete orientation or sign of the perturbation.

canonical_sentence: A spark is the minimal perturbation event sufficient to localize the initial active site and orient the centroid.
